'''Buula Nen''' was a [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].

==Biography==
Nen was the leader of a gang known as [[Buula's Raiders]] that operated out of a fortified [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid base]] called [[Buula's Rocky Home]] located in the [[Vessar Asteroid Field]]. He was involved in [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]], [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], and many other criminal activities. He had connections throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and used them to find targets for his raids. The pirate chieftain had a group of [[Chev]]s that had been enslaved to his family for generations.<ref name="H&S" />

==Personality and traits==
Nen was devious and cruel. He enjoyed manipulating his underlings and causing them to scheme against each other. He used this to maintain his control. He was a competent leader and would often take charge of raids when he felt that he could lead them better than his subordinates.<ref name="H&S" />

==Equipment==
Nen carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and had a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] he used as a personal ship. It was docked in a hidden [[Hangar/Legends|shuttle bay]] on his asteroid base.<ref name="H&S" />
